More Clients.

✓ No long-term contracts
YES, I WANT THAT!

Marketing is important...

...but there are already 101 things on your to-do list.

And they're all important too.

So How Do You Optimize Your Marketing?

Handle Everything Yourself?

That's fine if you have very little on your plate.

But if you're already pretty swamped... this isn't a viable option.

Hire New Staff?

Finding good people isn't easy. Training and onboarding takes time and money.

And even if you find the perfect person – you're still depending on just one individual.

Hire an Agency?

Don't have a marketing budget in the tens of thousands? Then you might end up having your account managed by the intern of the assistant's assistant.

Not exactly optimal.

"OK... So What Makes You So Different?"

Guaranteed

We only win if you win. That’s the basis for a good partnership. You won’t carry all the risk – we’ll share it.

Results

Our first priority is to get you results. Less talk, more walk.

Local

We’re not tucked away in some anonymous office. We’re a local company – you’ll be able to reach us when you need us.

Specialized

Jack of all trades... master of none. That’s why we work with industries we know, so we can guarantee results.

Our services

Websites & Web Design

Strategy discussion

Onboarding

04

What works?

We track relevant data, see what really works - and do more of it.

FAQs

Frequently asked questions

How much does online marketing cost for you?

This depends on what services you need and how competitive your market is. In the first conversation we will look at your situation and make you a concrete offer - without any hidden costs.

How quickly do I see the first results?

This varies depending on the service: With Google & Meta ads, the first clicks and inquiries are often possible within a few days. With SEO it usually takes 60-90 days to see measurable results. Web design and copywriting take effect as soon as the new version is live.

Do you only work in Bielefeld?

No - we work with local businesses throughout OWL and beyond. We value local proximity, but a personal meeting is not a prerequisite for most services.

Do I have to sign a contract?

We work transparently and without restrictive contracts. We discuss the exact conditions individually – tailored to your needs and goals.

What makes you better than other agencies?

We are a small, specialized unit - not an anonymous large company. You work directly with us, not with a junior employee. And we only earn when you see results.

How do we start?

Simply fill out the contact form or write to us directly. We will contact you within 24 hours and arrange a free initial consultation.

For free
